parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_memory (
  phone,
  name,
  lead_summary,
  lead_status,
  last_intent,
  selected_option,
  selected_option_start,
  option_1_start,
  option_2_start,
  requested_day,
  requested_date,
  requested_period,
  requested_time_min,
  requested_time_max,
  email,
  dify_uuid,
  account_id,
  conversation_id,
  contact_id,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,
  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_at,
  last_outbound_message_type,
  last_user_reply_at,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.sender_name || $json.name || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_summary || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_status || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_intent || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_1_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_2_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_day || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_date || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_period || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_min || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_max || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.email || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.dify_uuid || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.inbox_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.conversation_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.contact_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.system_event || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_ai_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_system_event || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_followup_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_followup_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_outbound_message_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_reply_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_flag || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.retry_count || 0) }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

  name = IF(VALUES(name) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(name) != '', VALUES(name), name),
  lead_summary = IF(VALUES(lead_summary) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(lead_summary) != '', VALUES(lead_summary), lead_summary),
  lead_status = IF(VALUES(lead_status) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(lead_status) != '', VALUES(lead_status), lead_status),
  last_intent = IF(VALUES(last_intent) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_intent) != '', VALUES(last_intent), last_intent),

  selected_option = IF(VALUES(selected_option) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(selected_option) != '', VALUES(selected_option), selected_option),
  selected_option_start = IF(VALUES(selected_option_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(selected_option_start) != '', VALUES(selected_option_start), selected_option_start),

  option_1_start = IF(VALUES(option_1_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_1_start) != '', VALUES(option_1_start), option_1_start),
  option_2_start = IF(VALUES(option_2_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_2_start) != '', VALUES(option_2_start), option_2_start),

  requested_day = IF(VALUES(requested_day) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_day) != '', VALUES(requested_day), requested_day),
  requested_date = IF(VALUES(requested_date) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_date) != '', VALUES(requested_date), requested_date),
  requested_period = IF(VALUES(requested_period) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_period) != '', VALUES(requested_period), requested_period),
  requested_time_min = IF(VALUES(requested_time_min) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_min) != '', VALUES(requested_time_min), requested_time_min),
  requested_time_max = IF(VALUES(requested_time_max) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_max) != '', VALUES(requested_time_max), requested_time_max),

  email = IF(VALUES(email) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(email) != '', VALUES(email), email),
  dify_uuid = IF(VALUES(dify_uuid) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(dify_uuid) != '', VALUES(dify_uuid), dify_uuid),

  account_id = IF(VALUES(account_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(account_id), account_id),
  conversation_id = IF(VALUES(conversation_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(conversation_id), conversation_id),
  contact_id = IF(VALUES(contact_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(contact_id), contact_id),

  system_event = IF(VALUES(system_event) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(system_event) != '', VALUES(system_event), system_event),

  last_user_message = IF(VALUES(last_user_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_user_message) != '', VALUES(last_user_message), last_user_message),
  last_ai_message = IF(VALUES(last_ai_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_ai_message) != '', VALUES(last_ai_message), last_ai_message),
  last_system_event = IF(VALUES(last_system_event) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_system_event) != '', VALUES(last_system_event), last_system_event),

  followup_count = VALUES(followup_count),
  last_followup_type = IF(VALUES(last_followup_type) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_followup_type), last_followup_type),
  last_followup_at = IF(VALUES(last_followup_at) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_followup_at), last_followup_at),
  last_outbound_message_type = IF(VALUES(last_outbound_message_type) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_outbound_message_type), last_outbound_message_type),
  last_user_reply_at = IF(VALUES(last_user_reply_at) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_user_reply_at), last_user_reply_at),

  error_flag = IF(VALUES(error_flag) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(error_flag) != '', VALUES(error_flag), error_flag),
  error_message = IF(VALUES(error_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(error_message) != '', VALUES(error_message), error_message),

  retry_count = VALUES(retry_count),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_history (
  phone,
  name,
  lead_summary,
  lead_status,
  last_intent,
  selected_option,
  selected_option_start,
  option_1_start,
  option_2_start,
  requested_day,
  requested_date,
  requested_period,
  requested_time_min,
  requested_time_max,
  email,
  dify_uuid,
  account_id,
  conversation_id,
  contact_id,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,
  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_at,
  last_outbound_message_type,
  last_user_reply_at,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.sender_name || $json.name || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_summary || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_status || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_intent || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_1_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_2_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_day || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_date || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_period || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_min || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_max || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.email || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.dify_uuid || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.inbox_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.conversation_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.contact_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.system_event || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_ai_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_system_event || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_followup_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_followup_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_outbound_message_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_reply_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_flag || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.retry_count || 0) }},
  NOW()
);

assignments.name: clean_answer
assignments.value: =Acabei de notificar nosso especialista para continuar a conversa com você.\n\nNosso atendimento é das 8h às 17h de segunda à sexta.

assignments.name: clean_answer
lead_summary
assignments.value:
={{ $json.answer.match(/#LEAD_SUMMARY:(.*)/)?.[1]?.trim() || "" }}

Erro no agendamento da reunião, chamado especialista para resolver.

assignments.name: clean_answer
lead_summary
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { let s = String($json.lead_summary || ''); s = s.replace(/Objeções:\s*recusou reunião/gi, 'Objeções: recusou horários oferecidos'); s = s.replace(/Último contexto:\s*lead recusou agendamento/gi, 'Último contexto: lead rejeitou as opções enviadas e pediu outra disponibilidade'); s = s.replace(/Próxima etapa:\s*encerrar contato/gi, 'Próxima etapa: verificar nova disponibilidade ou enviar link de agendamento'); if (!/Objeções:/i.test(s)) { s += `${s ? '; ' : ''}Objeções: recusou horários oferecidos`; } if (!/Último contexto:/i.test(s)) { s += `${s ? '; ' : ''}Último contexto: lead rejeitou as opções enviadas e pediu outra disponibilidade`; } if (!/Próxima etapa:/i.test(s)) { s += `${s ? '; ' : ''}Próxima etapa: verificar nova disponibilidade ou enviar link de agendamento`; } return s; })() }}

assignments.name: labels
assignments.value:
={{ (() => {
  switch ($json.lead_status) {

    case 'LEAD_NOVO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels

    case 'EM_QUALIFICACAO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"01-em-atendimento\"]")

    case 'QUALIFICADO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"03-lead-qualificado\"]")

    case 'AGENDAR_REUNIAO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"06-viu-analise-agendar-r1\"]")

    case 'CONFIRMAR_AGENDAMENTO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"06-viu-analise-agendar-r1\"]")

    case 'R1_AGENDADA':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")
                .replaceAll("]",",\"10-r1-agendada\"]")

    case 'HUMANO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'FORA_DO_PERFIL':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'LEAD_FRIO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'DESQUALIFICADO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'SO_CURIOSO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    default:
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
  }
})() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json?.lead_summary || "" }}",
    "lead_status": "AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO",
    "last_intent": "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",
    "name": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.sender_name }}",

    "system_event": "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",

    "option_1_display": "{{ $json.option_1.display }}",
    "option_2_display": "{{ $json.option_2.display }}",

    "option_1_start": "{{ $json.option_1.starts_at }}",
    "option_2_start": "{{ $json.option_2.starts_at }}"
  },

  "query": "[SYSTEM_EVENT] HORARIOS_ENVIADOS | STATUS=AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO | OPCOES=1) {{ $json.option_1.display }} | 2) {{ $json.option_2.display }}  | LEAD_DEVE_ESCOLHER_UMA_OPCAO",

  "response_mode": "streaming",

  {{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid==""?""
  :'"conversation_id":' + '"' + $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid + '",' }}

  "user": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.phone }}"
}

={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').first().json?.lead_summary || "" }}",
    "lead_status": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').item.json.lead_status }}",
    "last_intent": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').item.json.last_intent }}",
    "name": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.sender_name }}",

    "system_event": "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",

    "option_1_display": "{{ $json.option_1.display }}",
    "option_2_display": "{{ $json.option_2.display }}",

    "option_1_start": "{{ $json.option_1.starts_at }}",
    "option_2_start": "{{ $json.option_2.starts_at }}"
  },

  "query": "[SYSTEM_EVENT] HORARIOS_ENVIADOS | STATUS=AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO | OPCOES=1) {{ $json.option_1.display }} | 2) {{ $json.option_2.display }}  | LEAD_DEVE_ESCOLHER_UMA_OPCAO",

  "response_mode": "streaming",
  "conversation_id": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').first().json.dify_uuid }}",
  "user": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.phone }}"
}

={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json?.lead_summary || "" }}",
    "lead_status": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').item.json.lead_status }}",
    "last_intent": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').item.json.last_intent }}",
    "name": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.sender_name }}",

    "system_event": "REUNIAO_AGENDADA_SUCESSO",

    "confirmation_message_style": "assertiva_diagnostico",
    "must_include_meeting_url": "sim",
    "must_reinforce_importance": "sim",


    "meeting_datetime": "{{ $json.starts_at.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}",
    "meeting_url": {{ $json.meeting_url.toJsonString() }},
    "meeting_duration": "{{ $json.booking_type.duration_minutes.toString() }} minutos"
  },

  "query": "[SYSTEM_EVENT] REUNIAO_AGENDADA_SUCESSO | Envie a confirmação da reunião com data, duração, link e uma frase assertiva reforçando que a reunião é importante para um diagnóstico efetivo.",

  "response_mode": "streaming",

  {{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid==""?""
  :'"conversation_id":' + '"' + $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid + '",' }}

  "user": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.phone }}"
}

parameters.content: # VERIFICA SE É A ÚLTIMA MENSAGEM
# BUSCA MEMÓRIA DE ESTADO NO MYSQL

assignments.name: inputs
assignments.value:
={{ (() => {
  const hasContent = (value) => {
    if (value === null || value === undefined) return false;
    if (typeof value === "string") return value.trim() !== "";
    return true;
  };

  const optional = (key, value) => hasContent(value) ? { [key]: value } : {};

  const agendaStatuses = [
    "QUALIFICADO_AGENDAR",
    "AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO",
    "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",
    "HORARIO_SELECIONADO",
    "SOLICITAR_NOVAS_OPCOES",
    "CONFIRMAR_AGENDAMENTO",
    "REUNIAO_CONFIRMADA",
    "REUNIAO_REAGENDAR"
  ];

  const currentStatus = $json?.lead_status || "NOVO_LEAD";
  const inAgendaFlow = agendaStatuses.includes(currentStatus);

  return {
    lead_summary: $json?.lead_summary || "",
    lead_status: currentStatus,
    last_intent: $json?.last_intent || "",
    lead_name: $json?.sender_name || $json?.name || "",
    booking_link: $json?.booking_link || "https://agenda.convertix.app/r1",
    system_event: $json?.system_event || $json?.event || "",
    last_system_event: $json?.last_system_event || "",
    last_user_message: $json?.last_user_message || "",
    last_ai_message: $json?.last_ai_message || "",
    last_question: $json?.last_question || "",

    ...optional("email", $json?.email),
    ...optional("message_modality", $json?.message_modality),
    ...optional("entry_intent_level", $json?.entry_intent_level),
    ...optional("service_interest", $json?.service_interest),

    ...optional("company_name", $json?.company_name),
    ...optional("instagram_handle", $json?.instagram_handle),
    ...optional("website", $json?.website),
    ...optional("google_business_profile", $json?.google_business_profile),
    ...optional("niche", $json?.niche),
    ...optional("objective", $json?.objective),

    ...optional("sells_today", $json?.sells_today),
    ...optional("sells_via", $json?.sells_via),
    ...optional("current_channel", $json?.current_channel),
    ...optional("team_structure", $json?.team_structure),
    ...optional("decision_maker", $json?.decision_maker),
    ...optional("decision_maker_access", $json?.decision_maker_access),
    ...optional("process_maturity", $json?.process_maturity),
    ...optional("pain_point", $json?.pain_point),
    ...optional("urgency", $json?.urgency),
    ...optional("budget_status", $json?.budget_status),
    ...optional("current_investment", $json?.current_investment),
    ...optional("investment_range", $json?.investment_range),
    ...optional("zero_base_but_has_capital", $json?.zero_base_but_has_capital),
    ...optional("conversation_mode", $json?.conversation_mode),
    ...optional("continuation_policy", $json?.continuation_policy),
    ...optional("handoff_type", $json?.handoff_type),
    ...optional("disqualification_reason", $json?.disqualification_reason),
    ...optional("fit_convertix", $json?.fit_convertix),
    ...optional("out_of_scope_aligned", $json?.out_of_scope_aligned),

    ...(inAgendaFlow
      ? {
          selected_option: $json?.selected_option || "",
          option_1_start: $json?.option_1_start || "",
          option_2_start: $json?.option_2_start || "",
          selected_option_start: $json?.selected_option_start || "",
          requested_day: $json?.requested_day || "",
          requested_date: $json?.requested_date || "",
          requested_period: $json?.requested_period || "",
          requested_time_min: $json?.requested_time_min || "",
          requested_time_max: $json?.requested_time_max || ""
        }
      : {
          ...optional("selected_option", $json?.selected_option),
          ...optional("option_1_start", $json?.option_1_start),
          ...optional("option_2_start", $json?.option_2_start),
          ...optional("selected_option_start", $json?.selected_option_start),
          ...optional("requested_day", $json?.requested_day),
          ...optional("requested_date", $json?.requested_date),
          ...optional("requested_period", $json?.requested_period),
          ...optional("requested_time_min", $json?.requested_time_min),
          ...optional("requested_time_max", $json?.requested_time_max)
        })
  };
})() }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_memory (
  phone,
  name,

  last_intent,
  selected_option,
  selected_option_start,
  option_1_start,
  option_2_start,
  requested_day,
  requested_date,
  requested_period,
  requested_time_min,
  requested_time_max,
  email,
  dify_uuid,
  account_id,
  conversation_id,
  contact_id,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,
  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_at,
  last_outbound_message_type,
  last_user_reply_at,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.sender_name || $json.name || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_summary || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.lead_status || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_intent || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.selected_option_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_1_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.option_2_start || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_day || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_date || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_period || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_min || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.requested_time_max || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.email || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.dify_uuid || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.inbox_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.conversation_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.contact_id || 0) || 'NULL' }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.system_event || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_ai_message || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_system_event || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.followup_count || 0) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_followup_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_followup_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_outbound_message_type || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.last_user_reply_at || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_flag || null) }},
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.error_message || null) }},
  {{ Number($json.retry_count || 0) }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

  name = IF(VALUES(name) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(name) != '', VALUES(name), name),
  lead_summary = IF(VALUES(lead_summary) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(lead_summary) != '', VALUES(lead_summary), lead_summary),
  lead_status = IF(VALUES(lead_status) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(lead_status) != '', VALUES(lead_status), lead_status),
  last_intent = IF(VALUES(last_intent) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_intent) != '', VALUES(last_intent), last_intent),

  selected_option = IF(VALUES(selected_option) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(selected_option) != '', VALUES(selected_option), selected_option),
  selected_option_start = IF(VALUES(selected_option_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(selected_option_start) != '', VALUES(selected_option_start), selected_option_start),

  option_1_start = IF(VALUES(option_1_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_1_start) != '', VALUES(option_1_start), option_1_start),
  option_2_start = IF(VALUES(option_2_start) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(option_2_start) != '', VALUES(option_2_start), option_2_start),

  requested_day = IF(VALUES(requested_day) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_day) != '', VALUES(requested_day), requested_day),
  requested_date = IF(VALUES(requested_date) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_date) != '', VALUES(requested_date), requested_date),
  requested_period = IF(VALUES(requested_period) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_period) != '', VALUES(requested_period), requested_period),
  requested_time_min = IF(VALUES(requested_time_min) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_min) != '', VALUES(requested_time_min), requested_time_min),
  requested_time_max = IF(VALUES(requested_time_max) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(requested_time_max) != '', VALUES(requested_time_max), requested_time_max),

  email = IF(VALUES(email) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(email) != '', VALUES(email), email),
  dify_uuid = IF(VALUES(dify_uuid) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(dify_uuid) != '', VALUES(dify_uuid), dify_uuid),

  account_id = IF(VALUES(account_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(account_id), account_id),
  conversation_id = IF(VALUES(conversation_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(conversation_id), conversation_id),
  contact_id = IF(VALUES(contact_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(contact_id), contact_id),

  system_event = IF(VALUES(system_event) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(system_event) != '', VALUES(system_event), system_event),

  last_user_message = IF(VALUES(last_user_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_user_message) != '', VALUES(last_user_message), last_user_message),
  last_ai_message = IF(VALUES(last_ai_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_ai_message) != '', VALUES(last_ai_message), last_ai_message),
  last_system_event = IF(VALUES(last_system_event) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(last_system_event) != '', VALUES(last_system_event), last_system_event),

  followup_count = VALUES(followup_count),
  last_followup_type = IF(VALUES(last_followup_type) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_followup_type), last_followup_type),
  last_followup_at = IF(VALUES(last_followup_at) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_followup_at), last_followup_at),
  last_outbound_message_type = IF(VALUES(last_outbound_message_type) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_outbound_message_type), last_outbound_message_type),
  last_user_reply_at = IF(VALUES(last_user_reply_at) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(last_user_reply_at), last_user_reply_at),

  error_flag = IF(VALUES(error_flag) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(error_flag) != '', VALUES(error_flag), error_flag),
  error_message = IF(VALUES(error_message) IS NOT NULL AND VALUES(error_message) != '', VALUES(error_message), error_message),

  retry_count = VALUES(retry_count),
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;

INSERT INTO sdr_julia_lead_history (
  phone,
  name,
  lead_summary,
  lead_status,
  last_intent,
  selected_option,
  selected_option_start,
  option_1_start,
  option_2_start,
  requested_day,
  requested_date,
  requested_period,
  requested_time_min,
  requested_time_max,
  email,
  dify_uuid,
  account_id,
  conversation_id,
  contact_id,
  system_event,
  last_user_message,
  last_ai_message,
  last_system_event,
  followup_count,
  last_followup_type,
  last_followup_at,
  last_outbound_message_type,
  last_user_reply_at,
  error_flag,
  error_message,
  retry_count,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone || null) }},

  NOW()
);

assignments.name: clean_answer
assignments.value: =Acabei de notificar nosso especialista para continuar a conversa com você.\n\nNosso atendimento é das 8h às 17h de segunda à sexta.

assignments.name: clean_answer
lead_summary
assignments.value:
={{ $json.answer.match(/#LEAD_SUMMARY:(.*)/)?.[1]?.trim() || "" }}

Erro no agendamento da reunião, chamado especialista para resolver.

assignments.name: clean_answer
lead_summary
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { let s = String($json.lead_summary || ''); s = s.replace(/Objeções:\s*recusou reunião/gi, 'Objeções: recusou horários oferecidos'); s = s.replace(/Último contexto:\s*lead recusou agendamento/gi, 'Último contexto: lead rejeitou as opções enviadas e pediu outra disponibilidade'); s = s.replace(/Próxima etapa:\s*encerrar contato/gi, 'Próxima etapa: verificar nova disponibilidade ou enviar link de agendamento'); if (!/Objeções:/i.test(s)) { s += `${s ? '; ' : ''}Objeções: recusou horários oferecidos`; } if (!/Último contexto:/i.test(s)) { s += `${s ? '; ' : ''}Último contexto: lead rejeitou as opções enviadas e pediu outra disponibilidade`; } if (!/Próxima etapa:/i.test(s)) { s += `${s ? '; ' : ''}Próxima etapa: verificar nova disponibilidade ou enviar link de agendamento`; } return s; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": {{ $json?.lead_summary?.toJsonString() || "\"\"\"\"" }},
    "lead_status": {{ $json?.lead_status?.toJsonString() || "\"NOVO_LEAD\"" }},
    "last_intent": {{ $json.last_intent?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "email": {{ $json.email?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "selected_option": {{ $json.selected_option?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "option_1_start": {{ $json.option_1_start?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "option_2_start": {{ $json.option_2_start?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "selected_option_start": {{ $json.selected_option_start?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "requested_day": {{ $json.requested_day?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "requested_date": {{ $json.requested_date?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "requested_period": {{ $json.requested_period?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "requested_time_min": {{ $json.requested_time_min?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "requested_time_max": {{ $json.requested_time_max?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "system_event": {{ $json.system_event?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "last_system_event": {{ $json.last_system_event?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "last_user_message": {{ $json.last_user_message?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "last_ai_message": {{ $json.last_ai_message?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "error_flag": {{ $json.error_flag?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "error_message": {{ $json.error_message?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "retry_count": {{ $json.retry_count?.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
    "booking_link": {{ ($json.booking_link || "https://agenda.convertix.app/r1").toJsonString() }},
    "name": {{ $json.sender_name?.toJsonString() }}
  },
  "query": {{ $json.message?.toJsonString() }},
  "response_mode": "streaming",
  "conversation_id": {{ $json.dify_uuid.toJsonString() || "\"\"" }},
  "user": "{{ $json.phone }}"
}

assignments.name: labels
assignments.value:
={{ (() => {
  switch ($json.lead_status) {

    case 'LEAD_NOVO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels

    case 'EM_QUALIFICACAO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"01-em-atendimento\"]")

    case 'QUALIFICADO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"03-lead-qualificado\"]")

    case 'AGENDAR_REUNIAO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"06-viu-analise-agendar-r1\"]")

    case 'CONFIRMAR_AGENDAMENTO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("]",",\"06-viu-analise-agendar-r1\"]")

    case 'R1_AGENDADA':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")
                .replaceAll("]",",\"10-r1-agendada\"]")

    case 'HUMANO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'FORA_DO_PERFIL':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'LEAD_FRIO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'DESQUALIFICADO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    case 'SO_CURIOSO':
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
                .replaceAll("chatbot-ia-conversando","humano-assumiu")

    default:
      return $('Dados Mensagem').item.json.labels
  }
})() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json?.lead_summary || "" }}",
    "lead_status": "AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO",
    "last_intent": "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",
    "name": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.sender_name }}",

    "system_event": "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",

    "option_1_display": "{{ $json.option_1.display }}",
    "option_2_display": "{{ $json.option_2.display }}",

    "option_1_start": "{{ $json.option_1.starts_at }}",
    "option_2_start": "{{ $json.option_2.starts_at }}"
  },

  "query": "[SYSTEM_EVENT] HORARIOS_ENVIADOS | STATUS=AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO | OPCOES=1) {{ $json.option_1.display }} | 2) {{ $json.option_2.display }}  | LEAD_DEVE_ESCOLHER_UMA_OPCAO",

  "response_mode": "streaming",

  {{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid==""?""
  :'"conversation_id":' + '"' + $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid + '",' }}

  "user": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.phone }}"
}

={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').first().json?.lead_summary || "" }}",
    "lead_status": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').item.json.lead_status }}",
    "last_intent": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').item.json.last_intent }}",
    "name": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.sender_name }}",

    "system_event": "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",

    "option_1_display": "{{ $json.option_1.display }}",
    "option_2_display": "{{ $json.option_2.display }}",

    "option_1_start": "{{ $json.option_1.starts_at }}",
    "option_2_start": "{{ $json.option_2.starts_at }}"
  },

  "query": "[SYSTEM_EVENT] HORARIOS_ENVIADOS | STATUS=AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO | OPCOES=1) {{ $json.option_1.display }} | 2) {{ $json.option_2.display }}  | LEAD_DEVE_ESCOLHER_UMA_OPCAO",

  "response_mode": "streaming",
  "conversation_id": "{{ $('SOLICITAR NOVAS OPCOES').first().json.dify_uuid }}",
  "user": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.phone }}"
}

={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json?.lead_summary || "" }}",
    "lead_status": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').item.json.lead_status }}",
    "last_intent": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').item.json.last_intent }}",
    "name": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.sender_name }}",

    "system_event": "REUNIAO_AGENDADA_SUCESSO",

    "confirmation_message_style": "assertiva_diagnostico",
    "must_include_meeting_url": "sim",
    "must_reinforce_importance": "sim",


    "meeting_datetime": "{{ $json.starts_at.toDateTime().minus(3,'hours').format('yyyy-MM-dd TT') }}",
    "meeting_url": {{ $json.meeting_url.toJsonString() }},
    "meeting_duration": "{{ $json.booking_type.duration_minutes.toString() }} minutos"
  },

  "query": "[SYSTEM_EVENT] REUNIAO_AGENDADA_SUCESSO | Envie a confirmação da reunião com data, duração, link e uma frase assertiva reforçando que a reunião é importante para um diagnóstico efetivo.",

  "response_mode": "streaming",

  {{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid==""?""
  :'"conversation_id":' + '"' + $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid + '",' }}

  "user": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.phone }}"
}
